rootCause.summary: Legacy detectPartialZeroFishSnapshot treated empty cleanItems as zero-fish partial even when compact playerdata_gameitemdb uploads carried fish/stone in body.fishItems/body.stoneItems.
rootCause.missingCondition: partialInfo.isPartial blocked snapshotComplete; scanCompleted also required gameItemDbBuilt proof missing on compact uploads

omengwoi.before: upload_proof ... hasFishSnapshot=1 hasStoneSnapshot=1 snapshotComplete=0 inventoryReady=0 + PARTIAL_SNAPSHOT_PRESERVED zero_fish_in_upload
omengwoi.after: upload_proof ... hasFishSnapshot=1 hasStoneSnapshot=1 snapshotComplete=1 inventoryReady=1 fishCount=27 stoneCount=22

testsAdded: detectPartialZeroFishSnapshot ignores empty cleanItems when playerData rows exist
fish and stone snapshot without leaderstats marks inventoryReady but not snapshotComplete
compact gameitemdb upload with fish/stone is not blocked by legacy zero-fish partial path
